evidence.claim: Used Pinecone, OpenAI embeddings, GPT-4, fine-tuned models, BLEU, ROUGE, LlamaIndex, LoRA, QLoRA, BM25, MLflow, Spring Boot, TensorFlow, YOLO, LangChain, Elasticsearch
evidence.source_text: Skills: Pinecone... LlamaIndex... LoRA... QLoRA... BM25... MLflow... Spring Boot... TensorFlow... YOLO... LangChain... Elasticsearch

evidence.claim: Implemented RAG-based customer support chatbot reducing ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework for RAG systems using automatic metrics and human-in-the-loop scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.

evidence.claim: Built document ingestion pipelines including chunking and embedding
evidence.source_text: Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone)

evidence.claim: Learns primarily through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Believes retrieval problems are evaluation problems in disguise
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.

evidence.claim: Experience optimizing model costs by transitioning from GPT-4 to fine-tuned smaller models
evidence.source_text: answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control)
